task: Find the cheapest hotel + flight + car package from New York to San Francisco, departing tomorrow and returning on the fourth day from departure, for two adults and a six-year-old child. The package should be one room with free breakfast and spa access.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the search on Booking.com for a Hotel + Flight + Car package with the requested traveler setup and dates, then applied the required hotel constraints. Evidence shows: package type set to Hotel + Flight + Car; origin NYC and destination San Francisco; dates set to May 14–17, 2026 (tomorrow through the fourth day by the agent’s interpretation); travelers set to 2 adults, 1 child age 6, 1 room. On the package hotel results page, the agent force-applied the Free Breakfast filter and then the Spa filter, reducing results to 3 hotels. The cheapest filtered hotel result shown was La Quinta Inn & Suites by Wyndham San Francisco Airport West at $2618 total before flight/car finalization. The agent then selected the cheapest room, cheapest outbound flight, cheapest return flight, and lowest-total-price car. The final trip summary page explicitly showed the completed package details and total cost: Booking.com Trip Summary with La Quinta Inn & Suites by Wyndham San Francisco Airport West, free breakfast, selected flights, selected rental car, and total cost $2,569.57. This satisfies the task of finding the cheapest eligible hotel + flight + car package; booking was not required.
final_result_response:
Found the cheapest eligible Booking.com package. I did not book it.

**Cheapest package:** **$2,569.57 total**  
- **Pay today:** $2,469.45  
- **Due later:** $100.12  
- **Package savings:** $143.14

**Trip:** New York City to San Francisco  
- **Dates:** Thu, May 14 to Sun, May 17, 2026  
- **Travelers:** 2 adults, 1 child age 6  
- **Room:** 1 room, Deluxe Two Queen Beds Non-Smoking, sleeps 4  
- **Hotel:** La Quinta Inn & Suites by Wyndham San Francisco Airport West  
- **Includes:** Free breakfast, spa/spa-sauna amenity, hotel + flight + car, taxes and fees

**Flights selected:**
- Outbound: American Airlines Basic Economy, **LGA 5:23 PM → SFO 11:15 PM**, 1 stop
- Return: Frontier Basic Fare, **SFO 11:59 PM → EWR 12:32 PM +1**, 1 stop

**Car selected:**
- Dollar Rent A Car, **Nissan Quest or similar minivan**
- Pickup/drop-off: SFO rental car center
- Unlimited mileage
- Thu May 14 11:30 PM to Sun May 17 10:30 PM
action_history: Opening Booking.com: const pg1 = await openTab('https://www.booking.com/');
Dismissing sign-in popup: await page.locator('e1').click();
Opening Flight + Hotel search: await page.locator('e14').click();
Selecting package type: await page.locator('e19').click();
Entering departure city: await page.locator('e25').fill('New York');
Trying NYC airport code: await page.locator('e25').fill('NYC');
Selecting New York airports: await page.locator('e131').click();
Entering destination: await page.locator('e27').fill('SFO');
Selecting San Francisco: await page.locator('e152').click();
Opening date picker: await page.locator('e29').click();
Selecting travel dates: await page.locator('e173').click();
Setting return date: await page.locator('e176').click();
Opening traveler selector: await page.locator('e32').click();
Adding one child traveler: await page.locator('button').nth(8).click();
Submitting package search: await page.locator('e221').click();
Starting package results search: await page.locator('e33').click();
Closing cookie banner: await page.locator('e13').click();
Accepting cookies: await page.locator('e12').click();
Applying free breakfast filter: await page.locator('e33').click();
Selecting breakfast checkbox via DOM: await page.locator('input[type="checkbox"][aria-label^="Free Breakfast"]').first().click({ force: true });
Applying breakfast amenity: await page.locator('#Amenities-FBRKFST-checkbox-1').click({ force: true });
Showing more amenities: await page.locator('e41').click();
Applying spa filter: await page.locator('e218').click();
Expanding amenities again: await page.locator('e263').click();
Finding and clicking Spa checkbox: if (spaId3) await page.locator('#'+CSS.escape(spaId3)).click({force:true});
Applying Spa filter: await page.locator('#Amenities-SPA-checkbox-6').click({force:true});
Choosing cheapest hotel option: await page.locator('e364').click();
Selecting cheapest room to view package components: await page.locator('e43').click();
Selecting cheapest departure flight: await page.locator('e91').click();
Selecting cheapest return flight: await page.locator('e91').click();
Sorting cars by lowest total: await page.locator('e57').click();
Selecting lowest-price rental car: await page.locator('e198').click();

screenshots.title: Selecting cheapest room to view package components
